vision_profile.current_state: Vivek is a 23-year-old B.Sc CS graduate operating a cyber cafe, solving daily computer problems informally.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest fear is remaining in informal work where his valuable skills are not formally recognized with a proper IT title and career path.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to convert his practical, hands-on experience into a formal IT helpdesk role, gaining recognition and a stable career.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can confidently handle basic computer hardware, install essential software, and provide initial customer support for common IT issues.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a strong foundation, transforming your practical experience into recognized IT support expertise.

science.desc: A customer reports their new printer isn't connecting to their laptop. Walk through the steps to diagnose and resolve the issue, considering both hardware and software aspects.

video.title: The Art of IT Customer Support

scenario.title: Explaining Technical Issues to Non-Technical Users

science.desc: Describe a time you had to explain a complex technical issue to a non-technical person. How did you ensure they understood?

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can troubleshoot basic network connectivity issues, manage Windows operating systems, and resolve common software and hardware conflicts.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a reliable IT support professional, capable of diagnosing and resolving everyday technical challenges.

video.title: Introduction to TCP/IP and OSI Model

scenario.title: No Internet Access for All Users

science.desc: A user reports they cannot access any websites, but other devices on the same network are working fine. What steps would you take to troubleshoot this specific user's issue?

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can effectively use ticketing systems, provide remote support, and implement basic cybersecurity hygiene practices to protect user data.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a proactive IT support specialist, securing systems and streamlining service delivery.

modules.title: Collaboration & Tools (IT Service Management)
lessons: Introduction to Ticketing Systems (e.g., Zendesk, Service Now)

video.title: Navigating a Typical Helpdesk Ticketing System

scenario.title: Guiding a User Through Remote Desktop Setup

science.desc: How do you prioritize multiple incoming support tickets, especially when some are urgent and others are important?

video.title: Educating Users on Security Best Practices

scenario.title: Creating a 'Do's and Don'ts' Security Guide

science.desc: A user clicked on a suspicious link and now their browser is redirecting to unknown sites. What immediate steps do you take to contain the issue and investigate?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can perform in-depth Windows diagnostics, recover data, and write simple scripts to automate repetitive IT tasks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are evolving into a resourceful IT problem-solver, leveraging automation to enhance efficiency.

scenario.title: Resolving a Blue Screen of Death (BSOD)
Recovering Deleted Files from a Corrupted Drive

science.desc: A user's laptop is constantly freezing and showing 'Not Responding' errors. How would you systematically approach diagnosing and fixing this intermittent issue?

modules.title: Python for AI (IT Automation Basics)
lessons: Automating Simple System Tasks (e.g., file cleanup)

video.title: Your First Python Script for IT

scenario.title: Bulk User Account Creation with PowerShell
Designing a Simple User Onboarding Script

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can manage user accounts, configure network services, and monitor system performance, taking on more administrative responsibilities.
milestones.identity_statement: You are stepping into a junior administrator role, contributing to the stability and efficiency of IT infrastructure.

modules.title: Foundations of System Design (User & Resource Management)

scenario.title: Creating a New User Account with Specific Permissions
Restricting Folder Access for a Department

video.title: Setting Up Shared Folders and Printers

science.desc: Explain the difference between a user account and a service account in Active Directory and when you would use each.

scenario.title: Setting Up Alerts for Critical System Events
Investigating a System Crash Using Event Viewer

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You understand fundamental cloud computing and virtualization concepts, enabling you to support modern IT environments.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your horizons, preparing to support the evolving landscape of cloud-based IT services.

modules.title: Distributed Systems (Virtualization & Cloud Intro)
lessons: Cloud Computing Service Models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)

scenario.title: Setting Up a Virtual Machine for Testing

video.title: Exploring IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS Models

scenario.title: Identifying Appropriate Cloud Services for a Small Business

science.desc: A company is considering migrating their on-premise file server to a cloud storage solution. What are the key factors to consider, and what questions would you ask to help them decide?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You are fully prepared for IT Helpdesk roles, capable of leading projects, excelling in interviews, and planning your future career growth.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a confident IT Support Professional, ready to secure your dream job and embark on a fulfilling career path.

modules.title: High Level System Design (Capstone & Career Readiness)
lessons: Identifying Specialization Paths (e.g., Network Admin, Cybersecurity Analyst)

scenario.title: Planning a Software Rollout for 50 Users

science.desc: Where do you see yourself in 3-5 years in your IT career, and how does an IT Helpdesk role fit into that vision?
